# Per-source branches still living in the DWH presentation layer.
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. This file is the mechanical output of
# `--regenerate-baseline`. Hand-adding entries turns it back into a curated
# allowlist and defeats the shrink-only guarantee.
#
# Auto-generated by .github/scripts/check-dwh-source-agnostic.py
# Regenerate: python .github/scripts/check-dwh-source-agnostic.py --regenerate-baseline
#
# Each line is `<count>\t<token>\t<relpath>`. Migrate a family onto a source capability or
# engine adapter (see products/data_warehouse/backend/presentation/README.md), then regenerate
# to shrink. Empty means the presentation layer is fully source-agnostic — keep it that way.
